calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:36 am and concluding at 9:45 am.

Plaintiff Hudson Insurance Company is represented by Steven Booska, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant Troy B. York is present.

JEFF MORTIMER is sworn to testify on behalf of Pliantiff and testifies.

The Court reviews the Amended Supplemental Declaration of Jeff Mortimer filed 10/18/2023.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by cross-complainant and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the cross-complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Progressive Foundation, and against Defendant Chet Peeples, Chet W. Peeples, aka Chester Peeples, as follows:

1. Damages: $50,838.50
2. Prejudgment Interest: $15,251.00
3. Costs: $526.25
4. Attorney's Fees: $10,167.70

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $76,812.45

Proposed judgment signed and filed.(D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:34:43 a.m. and concluding at 09:36:20 a.m.

Plaintiff Hudson Insurance Company represented by Steven Alfred Booska, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Troy B. York (AKA Tahree Zaid) Individually and DBA Turn Key Motors not appearing.

Parties are working on settlement in this matter and it may resolve.
Court orders matter continued to Jul-19-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505 pursuant to request of Plaintiff.

If case settles, parties shall notifty the court clerk to remove the next hearing from calendar.
